old_post_content:
SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Tea-Trica BHA Foam 125ml

A gentle, pH-balanced cleanser infused with the power of Centella Asiatica and Tea-Trica to deeply cleanse and clarify the skin while maintaining its natural moisture barrier.

Key Benefits & Ingredients

Key benefits include gentle cleansing, improved skin texture, and reduced appearance of pores. The main active ingredients include:

  • Centella Asiatica Extract: Soothes and calms irritated skin
  • Tea-Trica: Hydrates and nourishes the skin
  • BHA (Beta Hydroxy Acid): Exfoliates and unclogs pores
  • Other ingredients: Glycerin, Panthenol, and Green Tea Extract

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water
  2. Apply a small amount of foam and massage onto skin for 30 seconds
  3. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water
  4. Pat dry with a clean towel
  5. Follow up with your regular skincare routine
